ud6.3:1.2: on one occasion the Blessed One was staying near Sāvatthī at Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
ud6.3:1.3:
And on that occasion the Blessed One sat reflecting on the various evil,
unskillful qualities that had been abandoned [in him] and on the various
skillful qualities that had gone to the culmination of their development.
ud6.3:2.1:
Then as he realized the various evil,
unskillful qualities that had been abandoned [in him] and the various
skillful qualities that had gone to the culmination of their development,
he on that occasion exclaimed:
ud6.3:3.1: Before, it was, then it wasn’t.
ud6.3:3.2: Before, it wasn’t, then it was.
